name: Shadow Amulet
description: A small talisman that clouds the senses of one's enemies when held perfectly still.

abilities.name: Fade
abilities.description: Turns the target invisible after a fade time. The invisibility is broken upon casting an ability or item, or upon attacking. Cooldown: 18. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 600. Duration: 3.5. Move Speed Slow: 35%. Reduces the target's movement speed for the whole duration.
